config.script:
if self.parent.custom.useSession:
		self.parent.custom.sessionFilters.Well = None
		self.parent.custom.sessionFilters.Lease = None
		self.parent.custom.sessionFilters.Pad = None
		self.parent.custom.sessionFilters.SubRoute = None
		self.parent.custom.sessionFilters.Route = None
		self.parent.custom.sessionFilters.Field = None
	
	else:
		self.parent.custom.currentFilters.Well = None
		self.parent.custom.currentFilters.Lease = None
		self.parent.custom.currentFilters.Pad = None
		self.parent.custom.currentFilters.SubRoute = None
		self.parent.custom.currentFilters.Route = None
		self.parent.custom.currentFilters.Field = None
		self.getSibling("Well_Dropdown").props.value = None
		
	self.getSibling("Facility_Dropdown").props.value = None
	self.getSibling("Lease_Dropdown").props.value = None
	self.getSibling("Pad_Dropdown").props.value = None
	self.getSibling("Sub_Route_Dropdown").props.value = None
	self.getSibling("Route_Dropdown").props.value = None
	self.getSibling("Field_Dropdown").props.value = None
	self.getSibling("Field_Dropdown").props.value = 1
	category = "clear"
	object_map = {
	    "lease": "Lease_Dropdown",
	    "well": "Well_Dropdown",
	    "site": "Pad_Dropdown",
	    "subroute": "Sub_Route_Dropdown",
	    "route": "Route_Dropdown",
	    "facility": "Facility_Dropdown",
	}
	filters = {
	    key: self.getSibling(val).props.value
	    for key, val in object_map.items()
	}
	from Navigation.Filter import NavigationFilter
	nav_filter = NavigationFilter(filters, None, category, 'Clear_Button')
	filters, current_options = nav_filter.update_navigation()
	
	
	for key, value in object_map.items():
	    if key == category:
	        continue
	    self.getSibling(value).props.value = filters[key]
	    if current_options.get(key) is not None:
	        self.getSibling(value).props.options = current_options.get(key)
	self.parent.custom.previousFilters.Lease = None
	self.parent.custom.previousFilters.Pad = None
	self.parent.custom.previousFilters.SubRoute = None
	self.parent.custom.previousFilters.Route = None
	self.parent.custom.previousFilters.Well = None
	self.parent.custom.previousFilters.Facility = None
	
	self.parent.custom.nextFilters.Lease = None
	self.parent.custom.nextFilters.Pad = None
	self.parent.custom.nextFilters.SubRoute = None
	self.parent.custom.nextFilters.Route = None
	self.parent.custom.nextFilters.Well = None
	self.parent.custom.nextFilters.Facility = None
	self.parent.custom.lastSelectedDropdown = 'Field_Dropdown'
	
#	system.perspective.print('Query Count: %s'%nav_filter.query_count)

transforms.code:
if value['useSession']:
		return value['session']
	else:
        
		return self.props.value
        
        #return 1
        
        # Changed by Jason Butler and Tony Gagler on 12/9/2025 in order to keep 'Pinedale' selected as the field.

config.script:
self.getSibling("Sub_Route_Dropdown").props.value = None
	self.getSibling("Pad_Dropdown").props.value = None
	self.getSibling("Well_Dropdown").props.value = None
	if self.props.value is None:
		self.parent.custom.lastSelectedDropdown = "Field_Dropdown"
	else:
		self.parent.custom.lastSelectedDropdown = "Route_Dropdown"
		
	category = "route"
	object_map = {
	    "lease": "Lease_Dropdown",
	    "well": "Well_Dropdown",
	    "site": "Pad_Dropdown",
	    "subroute": "Sub_Route_Dropdown",
	    "route": "Route_Dropdown",
	    "facility": "Facility_Dropdown",
	}
	filters = {
	    key: self.getSibling(val).props.value if key != category else self.props.value
	    for key, val in object_map.items()
	}
	options = {
	    key: self.getSibling(val).props.options if key != category else self.props.options
	    for key, val in object_map.items()
	}
	from Navigation.Filter import NavigationFilter
	nav_filter = NavigationFilter(filters, options, category, 'Route_Dropdown')
	filters, current_options = nav_filter.update_navigation()
	
	
	for key, value in object_map.items():
	    if key == category:
	        continue
	    if current_options.get(key) is not None:
	        self.getSibling(value).props.options = current_options.get(key)
	    self.getSibling(value).props.value = filters[key]
	if self.props.value is None:
		return
	next_filter, prev_filter = nav_filter.next_prev_filters()
	self.parent.custom.previousFilters.Lease = prev_filter["lease"]
	self.parent.custom.previousFilters.Pad = prev_filter["site"]
	self.parent.custom.previousFilters.SubRoute = prev_filter["subroute"]
	self.parent.custom.previousFilters.Route = prev_filter["route"]
	self.parent.custom.previousFilters.Well = prev_filter["well"]
	self.parent.custom.previousFilters.Facility = prev_filter["facility"]
	
	self.parent.custom.nextFilters.Lease = next_filter["lease"]
	self.parent.custom.nextFilters.Pad = next_filter["site"]
	self.parent.custom.nextFilters.SubRoute = next_filter["subroute"]
	self.parent.custom.nextFilters.Route = next_filter["route"]
	self.parent.custom.nextFilters.Well = next_filter["well"]
	self.parent.custom.nextFilters.Facility = next_filter["facility"]
	
	system.perspective.print('Query Count: %s'%nav_filter.query_count)

self.getSibling("Well_Dropdown").props.value = None
	self.getSibling("Pad_Dropdown").props.value = None
	if self.props.value is not None:
		self.parent.custom.lastSelectedDropdown = "Sub_Route_Dropdown"
	else:
		self.parent.custom.lastSelectedDropdown = "Route_Dropdown"
	category = "subroute"
	object_map = {
	    "lease": "Lease_Dropdown",
	    "well": "Well_Dropdown",
	    "site": "Pad_Dropdown",
	    "subroute": "Sub_Route_Dropdown",
	    "route": "Route_Dropdown",
	    "facility": "Facility_Dropdown",
	}
	filters = {
	    key: self.getSibling(val).props.value if key != category else self.props.value
	    for key, val in object_map.items()
	}
	options = {
	    key: self.getSibling(val).props.options if key != category else self.props.options
	    for key, val in object_map.items()
	}
	from Navigation.Filter import NavigationFilter
	nav_filter = NavigationFilter(filters, options, category, 'Sub_Route_Dropdown')
	filters, current_options = nav_filter.update_navigation()
	
	
	for key, value in object_map.items():
	    if key == category:
	        continue
	    if current_options.get(key) is not None:
	        self.getSibling(value).props.options = current_options.get(key)
	    self.getSibling(value).props.value = filters[key]
	
	if self.props.value is None:
		return
	next_filter, prev_filter = nav_filter.next_prev_filters()
	self.parent.custom.previousFilters.Lease = prev_filter["lease"]
	self.parent.custom.previousFilters.Pad = prev_filter["site"]
	self.parent.custom.previousFilters.SubRoute = prev_filter["subroute"]
	self.parent.custom.previousFilters.Route = prev_filter["route"]
	self.parent.custom.previousFilters.Well = prev_filter["well"]
	self.parent.custom.previousFilters.Facility = prev_filter["facility"]
	
	self.parent.custom.nextFilters.Lease = next_filter["lease"]
	self.parent.custom.nextFilters.Pad = next_filter["site"]
	self.parent.custom.nextFilters.SubRoute = next_filter["subroute"]
	self.parent.custom.nextFilters.Route = next_filter["route"]
	self.parent.custom.nextFilters.Well = next_filter["well"]
	self.parent.custom.nextFilters.Facility = next_filter["facility"]
	system.perspective.print('Query Count: %s'%nav_filter.query_count)

if self.props.value is None:
		self.parent.custom.lastSelectedDropdown = "Sub_Route_Dropdown"
	else:
		self.parent.custom.lastSelectedDropdown = "Pad_Dropdown"
	category = "site"
	object_map = {
	    "lease": "Lease_Dropdown",
	    "well": "Well_Dropdown",
	    "site": "Pad_Dropdown",
	    "subroute": "Sub_Route_Dropdown",
	    "route": "Route_Dropdown",
	    "facility": "Facility_Dropdown",
	}
	filters = {
	    key: self.getSibling(val).props.value if key != category else self.props.value
	    for key, val in object_map.items()
	}
	options = {
	    key: self.getSibling(val).props.options if key != category else self.props.options
	    for key, val in object_map.items()
	}
	from Navigation.Filter import NavigationFilter
	nav_filter = NavigationFilter(filters, options, category, 'Pad_Dropdown')
	filters, current_options = nav_filter.update_navigation()
	system.perspective.print('well filters on site|%s'%filters["well"])

#	    self.getSibling(value).props.value = filters[key]
	
	for key, value in object_map.items():

			continue
		if key == category and current_options.get(key) is not None:
		    self.props.options = current_options.get(key)
		if current_options.get(key) is not None:
		    self.getSibling(value).props.options = current_options.get(key)
		self.getSibling(value).props.value = filters[key]
	
	if self.props.value is None:
		return
	next_filter, prev_filter = nav_filter.next_prev_filters()
	self.parent.custom.previousFilters.Lease = prev_filter["lease"]
	self.parent.custom.previousFilters.Pad = prev_filter["site"]
	self.parent.custom.previousFilters.SubRoute = prev_filter["subroute"]
	self.parent.custom.previousFilters.Route = prev_filter["route"]
	self.parent.custom.previousFilters.Well = prev_filter["well"]
	self.parent.custom.previousFilters.Facility = prev_filter["facility"]
	
	self.parent.custom.nextFilters.Lease = next_filter["lease"]
	self.parent.custom.nextFilters.Pad = next_filter["site"]
	self.parent.custom.nextFilters.SubRoute = next_filter["subroute"]
	self.parent.custom.nextFilters.Route = next_filter["route"]
	self.parent.custom.nextFilters.Well = next_filter["well"]
	self.parent.custom.nextFilters.Facility = next_filter["facility"]
	system.perspective.print('Query Count: %s'%nav_filter.query_count)

config.script:
object_map = {
	    "lease": "Lease_Dropdown",
	    "well": "Well_Dropdown",
	    "site": "Pad_Dropdown",
	    "subroute": "Sub_Route_Dropdown",
	    "route": "Route_Dropdown",
	    "facility": "Facility_Dropdown",
	}
	inverse_object_map = {val: key for key, val in object_map.items()}
	category = inverse_object_map[self.parent.custom.lastSelectedDropdown]
	input_filters = {
	    "lease": self.parent.custom.previousFilters.Lease,
	    "well": self.parent.custom.previousFilters.Well,
	    "site": self.parent.custom.previousFilters.Pad,
	    "subroute": self.parent.custom.previousFilters.SubRoute,
	    "route": self.parent.custom.previousFilters.Route,
	    "facility": self.parent.custom.previousFilters.Facility,
	}
	options = {
	    key: self.getSibling(val).props.options
	    for key, val in object_map.items()
	}
	from Navigation.Filter import NavigationFilter
	nav_filter = NavigationFilter(input_filters, options, category, 'Previous_Button')
	filters, current_options = nav_filter.update_navigation()
	
	self.getSibling("Lease_Dropdown").props.value = filters["lease"]
	self.getSibling("Well_Dropdown").props.value = filters["well"]
	self.getSibling("Pad_Dropdown").props.value = filters["site"]
	self.getSibling("Sub_Route_Dropdown").props.value = filters["subroute"]
	self.getSibling("Facility_Dropdown").props.value = filters["facility"]
	
	for key, value in object_map.items():
	    self.getSibling(value).props.value = filters[key]
	    if current_options.get(key) is not None:
	        self.getSibling(value).props.options = current_options.get(key)
	
	next_filter, prev_filter = nav_filter.next_prev_filters()
	self.parent.custom.previousFilters.Lease = prev_filter["lease"]
	self.parent.custom.previousFilters.Pad = prev_filter["site"]
	self.parent.custom.previousFilters.SubRoute = prev_filter["subroute"]
	self.parent.custom.previousFilters.Route = prev_filter["route"]
	self.parent.custom.previousFilters.Well = prev_filter["well"]
	self.parent.custom.previousFilters.Facility = prev_filter["facility"]
	
	self.parent.custom.nextFilters.Lease = next_filter["lease"]

	self.parent.custom.nextFilters.Route = next_filter["route"]
	self.parent.custom.nextFilters.Well = next_filter["well"]
	self.parent.custom.nextFilters.Facility = next_filter["facility"]
	system.perspective.print('Query Count: %s'%nav_filter.query_count)

object_map = {
	    "lease": "Lease_Dropdown",
	    "well": "Well_Dropdown",
	    "site": "Pad_Dropdown",
	    "subroute": "Sub_Route_Dropdown",
	    "route": "Route_Dropdown",
	    "facility": "Facility_Dropdown",
	}
	inverse_object_map = {val: key for key, val in object_map.items()}
	category = inverse_object_map[self.parent.custom.lastSelectedDropdown]
	system.perspective.print('running next button with category: %s'%category)
	input_filters = {

	    "well": self.parent.custom.nextFilters.Well,

	from Navigation.Filter import NavigationFilter

	self.getSibling("Facility_Dropdown").props.value = filters["facility"]
	
	for key, value in object_map.items():
	    if current_options.get(key) is not None:
	        self.getSibling(value).props.options = current_options.get(key)
	    self.getSibling(value).props.value = filters[key]
	
	next_filter, prev_filter = nav_filter.next_prev_filters()
	self.parent.custom.previousFilters.Lease = prev_filter["lease"]

	self.parent.custom.previousFilters.Well = prev_filter["well"]

	self.parent.custom.nextFilters.SubRoute = next_filter["subroute"]
	self.parent.custom.nextFilters.Route = next_filter["route"]
	self.parent.custom.nextFilters.Well = next_filter["well"]
	self.parent.custom.nextFilters.Facility = next_filter["facility"]
	system.perspective.print('Query Count: %s'%nav_filter.query_count)

tooltip.text: When Disabled, each window will be unique. When Enabled, all windows share the selected information.

onChange.script:
if not currentValue and previousValue:
		system.perspective.sendMessage('updateFilters', payload = {'currentFilters':self.parent.custom.currentFilters})

config.script:
"""
	Optimized performance metrics script with user comments
	"""
	
	# ========================================
	# CONFIGURATION
	# ========================================
	LOG_DATABASE = 'IgnitionDB'
	DB1_NAME = 'IgnitionDB'
	DB2_NAME = 'IgnitionDB_Hist'
	DB3_NAME = 'IgnitionDB_RO'
	
	# Location information
	if not self.parent.custom.useSession:
	    WELL = self.parent.custom.currentFilters.Well
	elif self.parent.custom.sessionFilters.Well:
	    WELL = self.parent.custom.sessionFilters.Well
	else:
	    WELL = 'Unknown'
	if not self.parent.custom.useSession:
	    PAD = self.parent.custom.currentFilters.Pad
	elif self.parent.custom.sessionFilters.Pad:
	    PAD = self.parent.custom.sessionFilters.Pad
	else:
	    PAD = 'Unknown'
	if not self.parent.custom.useSession:
	    ROUTE = self.parent.custom.currentFilters.Route
	elif self.parent.custom.sessionFilters.Route:
	    ROUTE = self.parent.custom.sessionFilters.Route
	else:
	    ROUTE = 'Unknown'
	
	session = self.session
	
	# ========================================
	# SHOW POPUP TO COLLECT USER COMMENTS
	# ========================================
	try:
		user_comments_raw = system.perspective.openPopup(
			id='performance-comments',
			view='Popups/PerformanceComments',
			params={},
			position={'mode': 'modal'},
			modal=True
		)
		
		# If user cancelled (closes popup without clicking submit), exit early
		# Note: Empty string "" means they clicked Submit with no text (which is OK)
		if user_comments_raw is None:
			system.perspective.print('Performance report cancelled by user')
			return
		
		# Handle empty comments - use default message
		if user_comments_raw == "" or user_comments_raw == "No comments provided":
			username_temp = system.security.getUsername()
			timestamp = str(system.date.now())
			user_comments = 'User: {} reported issue at {}'.format(username_temp, timestamp)
			system.perspective.print('No comments provided, using default message')
		else:
			user_comments = str(user_comments_raw)
			system.perspective.print('User comments received: ' + user_comments[:50])
		
	except Exception as e:
		system.perspective.print('Error showing comment popup: ' + str(e))
		username_temp = system.security.getUsername()
		timestamp = str(system.date.now())
		user_comments = 'User: {} reported issue at {} (Error collecting comments)'.format(username_temp, timestamp)
		
	# ========================================
	# GATHER SESSION INFORMATION
	# ========================================
	try:
		current_session_id = str(session.props.id)
		session_info_list = system.perspective.getSessionInfo(usernameFilter=self.session.props.auth.user.userName)
		
		session_info = None
		for sess in session_info_list:
			if str(sess.get('id')) == current_session_id:
				session_info = sess
				break
		
		if session_info:
			session_id = str(session_info.get('id', 'Unknown'))
			username = str(session_info.get('username', 'Unknown'))
			user_agent = str(session_info.get('userAgent', 'Unknown'))
			project_name = str(session_info.get('project', 'Unknown'))
			session_uptime_ms = session_info.get('uptime', None)
			client_address = str(session_info.get('clientAddress', 'Unknown'))
			last_comm_ms = session_info.get('lastComm', None)
			session_scope = str(session_info.get('sessionScope', 'Unknown'))
			active_pages = session_info.get('activePages', None)
			recent_bytes_sent = session_info.get('recentBytesSent', None)
			total_bytes_sent = session_info.get('totalBytesSent', None)
			authorized = session_info.get('authorized', None)
			
			page_ids_list = session_info.get('pageIds', [])
			page_ids = ', '.join([str(pid) for pid in page_ids_list]) if page_ids_list else 'None'
		else:
			session_id = current_session_id
			username = system.security.getUsername()
			user_agent = str(session.props.userAgent) if hasattr(session.props, 'userAgent') else 'Unknown'
			project_name = 'Unknown'
			session_uptime_ms = None
			client_address = 'Unknown'
			last_comm_ms = None
			session_scope = 'Unknown'
			active_pages = None
			recent_bytes_sent = None
			total_bytes_sent = None
			page_ids = 'Unknown'
			authorized = None
			
	except Exception as e:
		system.perspective.print('Error getting session info: ' + str(e))
		session_id = str(session.props.id) if hasattr(session.props, 'id') else 'Error'
		username = system.security.getUsername()
		user_agent = 'Error'
		project_name = 'Error'
		session_uptime_ms = None
		client_address = 'Error'
		last_comm_ms = None
		session_scope = 'Error'
		active_pages = None
		recent_bytes_sent = None
		total_bytes_sent = None
		page_ids = 'Error'
		authorized = None
	
	# Get user roles
	try:
		user_roles = ', '.join(self.session.props.auth.user.roles)
	except:
		user_roles = 'Unknown'
	
	# Get current view path
	try:
		view_path = str(session.props.primaryPage.props.path) if hasattr(session.props, 'primaryPage') and session.props.primaryPage else 'Unknown'
	except:
		view_path = 'Unknown'
	
	# ========================================
	# PARSE BROWSER TYPE FROM USER AGENT
	# ========================================
	try:
		ua = user_agent.lower()
		if 'edge' in ua or 'edg/' in ua:
			browser_type = 'Edge'
		elif 'chrome' in ua and 'edge' not in ua:
			browser_type = 'Chrome'
		elif 'firefox' in ua:
			browser_type = 'Firefox'
		elif 'safari' in ua and 'chrome' not in ua:
			browser_type = 'Safari'
		elif 'designer' in ua or '<designer>' in ua:
			browser_type = 'Designer'
		else:
			browser_type = 'Other'
	except:
		browser_type = 'Unknown'
	
	# ========================================
	# ESTIMATE DEVICE TYPE FROM USER AGENT
	# ========================================
	try:
		ua_lower = user_agent.lower()
		
		if 'mobile' in ua_lower or 'android' in ua_lower and 'mobile' in ua_lower:
			device_type = 'Mobile'
			screen_width = 375
			screen_height = 667
		elif 'tablet' in ua_lower or 'ipad' in ua_lower or ('android' in ua_lower and 'mobile' not in ua_lower):
			device_type = 'Tablet'
			screen_width = 768
			screen_height = 1024
		elif 'iphone' in ua_lower:
			device_type = 'Mobile'
			screen_width = 375
			screen_height = 812
		elif 'designer' in ua_lower or '<designer>' in ua_lower:
			device_type = 'Designer'
			screen_width = None
			screen_height = None
		else:
			device_type = 'Desktop'
			screen_width = 1920
			screen_height = 1080
	except:
		device_type = 'Unknown'
		screen_width = None
		screen_height = None
	
	# ========================================
	# GET CURRENT PAGE ID FROM PAGE_IDS LIST
	# ========================================
	try:
		if page_ids_list and len(page_ids_list) > 0:
			current_page_id = str(page_ids_list[0])
		else:
			current_page_id = 'Unknown'
	except:
		current_page_id = 'Unknown'
	
	# ========================================
	# ESTIMATE COMPONENT COUNT
	# ========================================
	try:
		if recent_bytes_sent and recent_bytes_sent > 0:
			component_count_estimate = int(recent_bytes_sent / 750)
		else:
			component_count_estimate = None
	except:
		component_count_estimate = None
	
	# ========================================
	# MEASURE NETWORK LATENCY & CONNECTION QUALITY
	# ========================================
	try:
		start_time = system.date.now()
		system.tag.readBlocking(['[System]Gateway/CurrentDateTime'])
		end_time = system.date.now()
		network_latency_ms = int((end_time.time - start_time.time))
		
		if network_latency_ms < 50:
			connection_quality = 'Excellent'
		elif network_latency_ms < 150:
			connection_quality = 'Good'
		elif network_latency_ms < 300:
			connection_quality = 'Fair'
		else:
			connection_quality = 'Poor'
	except Exception as e:
		system.perspective.print('Error measuring network latency: ' + str(e))
		network_latency_ms = None
		connection_quality = 'Unknown'
	
	# ========================================
	# CALCULATE TIME SINCE LAST INTERACTION
	# ========================================
	try:
		time_since_last_interaction_ms = last_comm_ms if last_comm_ms else None
	except:
		time_since_last_interaction_ms = None
	
	# ========================================
	# GET GATEWAY CPU (only available metric)
	# ========================================
	try:
		cpu_result = system.tag.readBlocking(['[System]Gateway/Performance/CPU Usage'])[0]
		if cpu_result.quality.isGood():
			gateway_cpu = cpu_result.value
		else:
			gateway_cpu = None
	except:
		gateway_cpu = None
	
	# ========================================
	# HELPER FUNCTION TO GET DB CONNECTION INFO
	# ========================================
	def getDbConnectionInfo(db_name):
		try:
			db_conn_dataset = system.db.getConnectionInfo(db_name)
			
			if db_conn_dataset.getRowCount() > 0:
				return {
					'connection_name': str(db_conn_dataset.getValueAt(0, 'Name')),
					'connection_description': str(db_conn_dataset.getValueAt(0, 'Description')),
					'type': str(db_conn_dataset.getValueAt(0, 'DBType')),
					'status': str(db_conn_dataset.getValueAt(0, 'Status')),
					'ext_status': str(db_conn_dataset.getValueAt(0, 'ExtStatus')),
					'throughput': db_conn_dataset.getValueAt(0, 'Throughput'),
					'active_connections': db_conn_dataset.getValueAt(0, 'ActiveConnections'),
					'max_connections': db_conn_dataset.getValueAt(0, 'MaxConnections'),
					'validation_query': str(db_conn_dataset.getValueAt(0, 'ValidationQuery'))[:500]
				}
			else:
				return {
					'connection_name': db_name,
					'connection_description': 'Not found',
					'type': 'Unknown',
					'status': 'Not found',
					'ext_status': 'Unknown',
					'throughput': None,
					'active_connections': None,
					'max_connections': None,
					'validation_query': None
				}
		except Exception as e:
			system.perspective.print('Error getting connection info for {}: {}'.format(db_name, str(e)))
			return {
				'connection_name': db_name,
				'connection_description': 'Error',
				'type': 'Unknown',
				'status': 'Error',
				'ext_status': 'Unknown',
				'throughput': None,
				'active_connections': None,
				'max_connections': None,
				'validation_query': None
			}
	
	# ========================================
	# GET DATABASE CONNECTION INFO FOR ALL 3 DBs
	# ========================================
	db1_info = getDbConnectionInfo(DB1_NAME)
	db2_info = getDbConnectionInfo(DB2_NAME)
	db3_info = getDbConnectionInfo(DB3_NAME)
	
	# ========================================
	# BUILD USER NOTES WITH CONTEXT AND COMMENTS
	# ========================================
	user_notes = 'User: {} reported slowdown at {} from {} on {} (est. {}x{}). Comments: {}'.format(
		username,
		str(system.date.now()),
		device_type,
		browser_type,
		screen_width if screen_width else 'Unknown',
		screen_height if screen_height else 'Unknown',
		user_comments
	)
	
	# ========================================
	# PREPARE AND EXECUTE DATABASE INSERT
	# ========================================
	insert_query = """
	INSERT INTO Ignition.performance_logs (
		session_id, username, user_roles,
		well, pad, route,
		view_path,
		user_agent, client_address, session_scope, session_uptime_ms, last_comm_ms,
		active_pages, recent_bytes_sent, total_bytes_sent, page_ids, authorized,
		network_latency_ms,
		gateway_cpu_percent, thread_pool_max,
		db1_connection_name, db1_connection_description, db1_type, db1_status, 
		db1_ext_status, db1_throughput, db1_active_connections, 
		db1_max_connections, db1_validation_query,
		db2_connection_name, db2_connection_description, db2_type, db2_status, 
		db2_ext_status, db2_throughput, db2_active_connections, 
		db2_max_connections, db2_validation_query,
		db3_connection_name, db3_connection_description, db3_type, db3_status, 
		db3_ext_status, db3_throughput, db3_active_connections, 
		db3_max_connections, db3_validation_query,
		browser_type, device_type, screen_width, screen_height,
		connection_quality, time_since_last_interaction_ms, 
		component_count_estimate, current_page_id,
		user_notes
	) VALUES (
		?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?,
		?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?,
		?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?,
		?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?,
		?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?
	)
	"""
	
	params = [
		session_id, username, user_roles,
		WELL, PAD, ROUTE,
		view_path,
		user_agent, client_address, session_scope, session_uptime_ms, last_comm_ms,
		active_pages, recent_bytes_sent, total_bytes_sent, page_ids, authorized,
		network_latency_ms,
		gateway_cpu, 100,
		db1_info['connection_name'], db1_info['connection_description'], 
		db1_info['type'], db1_info['status'], db1_info['ext_status'], 
		db1_info['throughput'], db1_info['active_connections'], 
		db1_info['max_connections'], db1_info['validation_query'],
		db2_info['connection_name'], db2_info['connection_description'], 
		db2_info['type'], db2_info['status'], db2_info['ext_status'],
		db2_info['throughput'], db2_info['active_connections'], 
		db2_info['max_connections'], db2_info['validation_query'],
		db3_info['connection_name'], db3_info['connection_description'], 
		db3_info['type'], db3_info['status'], db3_info['ext_status'],
		db3_info['throughput'], db3_info['active_connections'], 
		db3_info['max_connections'], db3_info['validation_query'],
		browser_type, device_type, screen_width, screen_height,
		connection_quality, time_since_last_interaction_ms,
		component_count_estimate, current_page_id,
		str(user_notes)
	]
	
	try:
		system.db.runPrepUpdate(insert_query, params, LOG_DATABASE)
		
		system.perspective.print('✓ Performance metrics logged successfully!')
		system.perspective.print('  Session: {} ({})'.format(session_id[:8] if len(session_id) > 8 else session_id, session_scope))
		system.perspective.print('  User: {} from {}'.format(username, client_address))
		system.perspective.print('  Location: Well {}, Pad {}, Route {}'.format(WELL, PAD, ROUTE))
		system.perspective.print('  Comments: {}'.format(user_comments[:100]))
		system.perspective.print('  Device: {} on {} (est. {}x{})'.format(device_type, browser_type, screen_width, screen_height))
		system.perspective.print('  Network: {} ({}ms), Idle: {}ms'.format(connection_quality, network_latency_ms, time_since_last_interaction_ms))
		system.perspective.print('  Gateway CPU: {}%'.format(round(gateway_cpu * 100, 2) if gateway_cpu else 'N/A'))
		system.perspective.print('  DB Status: {} / {} / {}'.format(db1_info['status'], db2_info['status'], db3_info['status']))
		
		system.perspective.sendMessage(
			'performance-log-success',
			{'message': 'Performance metrics logged successfully. Thank you for reporting!', 'type': 'success'},
			scope='session'
		)
		
	except Exception as e:
		system.perspective.print('✗ Error logging performance metrics: ' + str(e))
		system.perspective.sendMessage(
			'performance-log-error',
			{'message': 'Failed to log performance metrics. Please try again.', 'type': 'error', 'detail': str(e)},
			scope='session'
		)

"""
	Open performance logging popup with current context
	"""
	
	# ========================================
	# GATHER CONTEXT TO PASS TO POPUP
	# ========================================
	
	# Location information
	if not self.parent.custom.useSession:
	    WELL = self.parent.custom.currentFilters.Well
	    PAD = self.parent.custom.currentFilters.Pad
	    ROUTE = self.parent.custom.currentFilters.Route
	elif self.parent.custom.sessionFilters.Well:
	    WELL = self.parent.custom.sessionFilters.Well
	    PAD = self.parent.custom.sessionFilters.Pad
	    ROUTE = self.parent.custom.sessionFilters.Route
	else:
	    WELL = 'Unknown'
	    PAD = 'Unknown'
	    ROUTE = 'Unknown'
	
	# Pass context to popup as parameters
	params = {
	    'well': WELL,
	    'pad': PAD,
	    'route': ROUTE
	}
	
	# Open popup (non-blocking)
	system.perspective.openPopup(
	    id='performance-comments',
	    view='Popups/PerformanceComments',
	    params=params,
	    position={'mode': 'modal'},
	    modal=True
	)

#when filter dock loads (which will only be one time since its a static dock),
	#mimic the clear button. nothing should be selected. 
	#this prevents saved values in designer from auto selecting in production
	
	# existing border clears
	self.getChild("Well_Dropdown").props.style.borderColor = ''
	self.getChild("Pad_Dropdown").props.style.borderColor = ''
	self.getChild("Route_Dropdown").props.style.borderColor = ''
	self.getChild("Field_Dropdown").props.style.borderColor = ''
	self.getChild("Lease_Dropdown").props.style.borderColor = ''
	self.getChild("Sub_Route_Dropdown").props.style.borderColor = ''   # <-- NEW
	
	# existing value clears
	self.getChild("Well_Dropdown").props.value = None
	self.getChild("Pad_Dropdown").props.value = None
	self.getChild("Route_Dropdown").props.value = None
	self.getChild("Field_Dropdown").props.value = 1
	self.getChild("Lease_Dropdown").props.value = None
	self.getChild("Sub_Route_Dropdown").props.value = None             # <-- NEW
	
	#    self.lastSelectedCheck()
	self.custom.lastSelectedDropdown = "Field_Dropdown"
	
	self.getChild("Well_Dropdown").props.options = system.db.runNamedQuery('Navigation/Well')
	self.getChild("Pad_Dropdown").props.options = system.db.runNamedQuery('Navigation/Site')
	self.getChild("Route_Dropdown").props.options = system.db.runNamedQuery('Navigation/Route')
	self.getChild("Field_Dropdown").props.options = system.db.runNamedQuery('Navigation/Field')
	self.getChild("Lease_Dropdown").props.options = system.db.runNamedQuery('Navigation/Lease')
	self.getChild("Sub_Route_Dropdown").props.options = system.db.runNamedQuery('Navigation/Subroute')

transforms.code:
# value = name of the last dropdown that changed
    lastSelectedDropdown = value
    # Always start with a safe default
    lastSelectedName = ""
    # If nothing triggered or we get an unexpected value, just store/return empty
    if not lastSelectedDropdown:
        self.session.custom.lastSelectedName = lastSelectedName
        return lastSelectedName
    if lastSelectedDropdown == "Sub_Route_Dropdown":
        routeValue = self.getChild("Route_Dropdown").props.value
        routeDataset = self.getChild("Route_Dropdown").props.options
        if routeDataset is not None:
            for i in range(routeDataset.getRowCount()):
                if routeDataset.getValueAt(i, 0) == routeValue:
                    sub_val = self.getChild("Sub_Route_Dropdown").props.value
                    # handle None for sub_val safely
                    if sub_val is None:
                        sub_val = 0
                    lastSelectedName = "{} Sub:{}".format(
                        routeDataset.getValueAt(i, 1),
                        sub_val
                    )
                    break
    else:
        # lastSelectedDropdown should be the *name* of a child, like "Field_Dropdown"
        comp = self.getChild(lastSelectedDropdown)
        lastValue = comp.props.value
        lastSelectedDataset = comp.props.options
        if lastSelectedDataset is not None:
            for i in range(lastSelectedDataset.getRowCount()):
                if lastSelectedDataset.getValueAt(i, 0) == lastValue:
                    lastSelectedName = lastSelectedDataset.getValueAt(i, 1)
                    break
    self.session.custom.lastSelectedName = lastSelectedName
    return lastSelectedName

try: return value.rsplit('/',1)[1]
	except: return None

messageHandlers.script:
currentFilters = payload['currentFilters']
	self.getChild("Field_Dropdown").props.value = currentFilters['Field']
	self.getChild("Route_Dropdown").props.value = currentFilters['Route']
	self.getChild("Well_Dropdown").props.value = currentFilters['Well']
	self.getChild("Pad_Dropdown").props.value = currentFilters['Pad']
	self.getChild("Lease_Dropdown").props.value = currentFilters['Lease']
